execute.stdout:
hi -> short

code:
import io
import string

fn classify(_ n: Int) -> String
  if n <= 3
    "short"
  else if n <= 7
    "medium"
  else
    "long"
  end
end

mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    if n > 0
      let cat = classify(n)
      println("#{line} -> #{cat}")
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end
